constraints.layout_style: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click
Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root
Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute

reference_templates.title: Off-screen positioned input
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Off-screen input

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute Reference DOM (Number min max experience): Years of experience number input with min/max constraints Reference DOM (Split date selects): Start date as three separate day/month/year select elements Reference DOM (Off-screen positioned input): Input positioned at -9999px off-screen (accessibility anti-pattern) Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: details-accordion, shadow-host, custom-combobox, div-role-textbox, label-wraps-deep. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Number min max experience; Split date selects; Off-screen positioned input.
